overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character navigating a dark, rainy forest at night using a flashlight. The character walks steadily through increasingly rocky terrain, transitioning from open forest floor to a narrow passage between large boulders.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy forest trail with ferns and grass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill through the rainy forest holding a flashlight to illuminate the path ahead

entered.detail: tall dark tree trunks rising in the background against the night sky
grass-covered forest floor sloping gently uphill
clusters of green ferns illuminated by the flashlight beam
scattered dead branches and twigs on the forest floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dark, rain-soaked forest trail, illuminating ferns and grassy terrain with a flashlight. Tall pine trees stand in the background while rain streaks through the flashlight beam.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest slope with scattered boulders

events.description: terrain transitions from grassy forest floor to rocky ground with larger stone formations

agents.ego_description: navigating the uneven rocky terrain while shining the flashlight on the wet ground ahead

entered.detail: uneven ground covered with rocks, gravel and patches of grass
large gray rock formation emerging on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The forest floor becomes increasingly rocky as the character continues uphill. Large boulders appear on the right side while the terrain shifts from soft grass to uneven stones and gravel.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between massive rock formations

events.description: entering tight corridor between two massive boulder walls

agents.ego_description: carefully walking through the narrow gap between massive rocks, illuminating the stone walls with the flashlight

entered.detail: tall vertical stone wall forming the right side of a narrow passage
tall vertical stone wall forming the left side of a narrow passage
tight corridor pathway squeezed between two massive boulders

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow rock corridor flanked by massive stone walls on both sides. The flashlight illuminates the rough texture of the boulders as rain continues to fall in the confined space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked forest that gradually tightens into a narrow rocky corridor. It begins on a dark trail where a flashlight beam cuts through falling rain to illuminate ferns and grassy terrain beneath towering pine trees. As the character moves uphill, the soft ground shifts into uneven stones and gravel, with large boulders beginning to emerge on the right. The scene then closes in as the path enters a confined passage flanked by massive stone walls on both sides. Finally, the flashlight reveals the rough, wet textures of the boulders as the character navigates the narrow gap under the persistent rain.
